Why digital twins in dam monitoring
Integration of digital twin with Autodesk tools

client_mentions.name: Brazil

summary: This video focuses on the application and benefits of digital twins for real-time dam monitoring, highlighting safety, efficiency, and decision-making enhancements. The implementation utilizes Autodesk products like Civil 3D, Dynamo, and Forge to model and integrate digital environments with monitored data, advancing productivity and compliance efforts in infrastructure projects.
